title: Irish Lamb Stew
description: A hearty, comforting Irish lamb stew made with tender lamb, root vegetables, and a rich gravy.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Dust lamb cubes with flour, shaking off excess.
Brown lamb in batches until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a plate.
Reduce heat to medium and cook onions until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add carrots and potatoes; cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add beef broth, red wine (if using), and browned lamb. Stir to combine.
Bring stew to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, until lamb is tender, about 1 1/2 hours.
Season with thyme and salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional thyme if desired.
